summary: Iteration 54: Complete testing of Anomaly Detection feature. Backend: 21/21 tests passed for GET /api/anomaly-detection/scan and GET /api/anomaly-detection/history endpoints. Frontend: All UI features verified - Run Scan button, 7 summary cards (Total/Critical/Warning/Info/Sales/Expenses/Bank), category filter pills (All/Sales/Expenses/Bank), severity filter pills (All Severity/Critical/Warning/Info), anomaly list with 12 items showing severity icons, badges, descriptions, actual/expected/z-score values, and scan history with 20+ entries. Navigation link visible under Reports in sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/anomaly-detection/scan (line 395-431 anomaly_detection.py) - Runs 3 detectors (sales, expenses, bank), returns scan summary with severity counts and by_category breakdown, saves scan to anomaly_scans collection, properly removes _id before returning.
GET /api/anomaly-detection/history (line 434-438 anomaly_detection.py) - Returns last 20 scans sorted by scanned_at desc, excludes _id from results.
detect_sales_anomalies (line 46-181) - Detects daily sales spikes/drops, transaction count anomalies, payment mode shifts (15%+ change), branch underperformance using z-scores.
detect_expense_anomalies (line 188-286) - Detects expenses above category average, weekly spending trends, category concentration (40%+ of total).
detect_bank_anomalies (line 293-388) - Detects match rate drops, flagged transaction spikes, large unmatched transactions (>= 5000 SAR with z-score >= 3).
Frontend AnomalyDetectionPage.jsx (line 1-267) - Properly uses data-testid attributes, 7 summary cards, category/severity filters work correctly, anomaly list shows all required fields.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing sales, expenses, and bank statement data. 12 anomalies detected: 1 critical (SAR 54K bank txn), 11 warnings (9 bank large unmatched, 2 sales payment mode shifts, 1 expense category concentration).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anomaly Detection fully tested. Page at /anomaly-detection. Key data-testids: anomaly-detection-page, anomaly-page-title, run-scan-btn, first-scan-btn (when no scan done), scan-summary (7 cards), anomaly-filters, filter-{all|sales|expenses|bank}, sev-filter-{all|critical|warning|info}, anomaly-list, anomaly-row-{idx}, scan-history, scan-row-{idx}. Nav link at data-testid='nav-anomaly-detection' under Reports group. Current scan shows 12 anomalies total.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/anomaly-detection/scan returns: PASS - Has id, scanned_at, period_days, total_anomalies, critical, warning, info, by_category
backend_api_tests.Anomaly has required fields: PASS - id, category, type, severity, title, description, value, expected, z_score, date, metric

frontend_ui_tests.7 summary cards: PASS - Total, Critical, Warning, Info, Sales, Expenses, Bank
frontend_ui_tests.Severity filter pills: PASS - All Severity, Critical, Warning, Info
frontend_ui_tests.Anomaly row shows severity icon: PASS - AlertOctagon for critical, AlertTriangle for warning

frontend_ui_tests.Navigation works: PASS - Clicking nav link navigates to /anomaly-detection
frontend_ui_tests.Toast notification: PASS - '1 critical anomalies detected!' banner shown after scan
